nasb.text: Next to him Uzziel the son of Harhaiah of the goldsmiths made repairs. And next to him Hananiah, one of the perfumers, made repairs, and they restored Jerusalem as far as the Broad Wall.

esv.text: Next to them Uzziel the son of Harhaiah, goldsmiths, repaired. Next to him Hananiah, one of the perfumers, repaired, and they restored Jerusalem as far as the Broad Wall.

cnv.text: 再接著的一段由金匠哈海雅的兒子烏薛修築。接著這一段的是由作香料的哈拿尼雅修築。他們修葺耶路撒冷的城牆，直到寬牆。

ccb.text: 再下一段由哈海雅的儿子金匠乌薛修筑。 再下一段由制造香料的哈拿尼雅修筑，他们修筑耶路撒冷的城墙，直到宽墙。
